text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oof, I feel so nervous and trembly!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I guess that means... I just wanna win that badly!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win, and that'll show everyone I can run
in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go get first place! Just you wait!
